name: Orange Cheesecake with Cranberry-Orange Toppi
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham cracker crumbs, sugar, melted butter, and orange zest. Press into a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar. Add flour. Mix well. Add eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition. Stir in sour cream, orange liqueur, and orange zest. Pour over crust.
3. Place cheesecake in the oven and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
4. Turn off the oven and allow the cheesecake to cool in place for 1 hour.
5. Loosen edges and refrigerate.
6. Pulse orange pieces, cranberries, and sugar in a food processor until desired consistency is reached. Top half of the mixture on the cheesecake and serve the other half with the cake.
